important.subject: Re: Presentation shared with you: "Veer_Online_Weekly Presentation_2026_.pptx"
important.snippet: Hi Anu, I have formatted the three teams to the best of my abilities. I really feel we should get properly shot pictures of everyone and build consistently to have a much more professional looking deck. We'll get there. Do take a look and let me know if you need any other changes. Additionally, Harshad and I were talking and we realized that having a powerful audio track of the National Anthem in our in-person meetings will pep up the energy. I will look for one and share it with you on our Dukh Dard group. Please take it forward from next month, especially because we are going to be celebrating Independence Day! Best Regards, *Deepti Pawar*Founder and Director wytefyre.com | +91 9148 278 005 On Fri, Jul 3, 2026 at 1:08 PM BNI VEER LT (via Google Slides) < drive-shares-dm-noreply@google.com> wrote: > BNI VEER LT shared a presentation > [image: Header profile photo] > BNI VEER LT (bniveerlt@gmail.com) has invited you to *edit* the following > presentation: > Hi , Greetings !!!! > > Shar
important.reason: Sender is a BNI Veer chapter member.
